answer.content:
<html>
<head>
    <title>Random Forest Interactive Demo</title>
    <script>
        // Global state
        let state = {
            nTrees: 10,
            maxDepth: 5,
            minSamplesSplit: 2,
            nSamples: 100,
            noiseLevel: 0.1,
            datasetType: 'moons',
            currentTree: 0,
            showAllTrees: false,
            showDecisionBoundary: true,
            showSamples: true,
            showTreeStructure: false
        };

        // Data
        let samples = [];
        let labels = [];
        let trees = [];
        let predictions = [];

        // DOM elements
        let canvas, ctx;
        let treeCanvas, treeCtx;

        // Initialize
        window.onload = function() {
            canvas = document.getElementById('mainCanvas');
            ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
            treeCanvas = document.getElementById('treeCanvas');
            treeCtx = treeCanvas.getContext('2d');
            
            generateData();
            trainModel();
            render();
            
            // Set up event listeners
            document.getElementById('nTrees').addEventListener('input', updateNTrees);
            document.getElementById('maxDepth').addEventListener('input', updateMaxDepth);
            document.getElementById('minSamplesSplit').addEventListener('input', updateMinSamplesSplit);
            document.getElementById('nSamples').addEventListener('input', updateNSamples);
            document.getElementById('noiseLevel').addEventListener('input', updateNoiseLevel);
            document.getElementById('datasetType').addEventListener('change', updateDatasetType);
            document.getElementById('currentTree').addEventListener('input', updateCurrentTree);
            document.getElementById('showAllTrees').addEventListener('change', toggleShowAllTrees);
            document.getElementById('showDecisionBoundary').addEventListener('change', toggleShowDecisionBoundary);
            document.getElementById('showSamples').addEventListener('change', toggleShowSamples);
            document.getElementById('showTreeStructure').addEventListener('change', toggleShowTreeStructure);
            document.getElementById('trainBtn').addEventListener('click', retrainModel);
            document.getElementById('generateDataBtn').addEventListener('click', regenerateData);
        };

        // Data generation
        function generateData() {
            samples = [];
            labels = [];
            
            if (state.datasetType === 'moons') {
                generateMoons();
            } else if (state.datasetType === 'circles') {
                generateCircles();
            } else if (state.datasetType === 'blobs') {
                generateBlobs();
            } else if (state.datasetType === 'xor') {
                generateXOR();
            }
            
            // Add noise
            for (let i = 0; i < samples.length; i++) {
                samples[i][0] += (Math.random() - 0.5) * state.noiseLevel;
                samples[i][1] += (Math.random() - 0.5) * state.noiseLevel;
            }
        }

        function generateMoons() {
            for (let i = 0; i < state.nSamples; i++) {
                const angle = Math.PI * Math.random();
                const radius = 0.4 + 0.1 * Math.random();
                
                if (i < state.nSamples / 2) {
                    samples.push([radius * Math.cos(angle) + 0.5, radius * Math.sin(angle) + 0.5]);
                    labels.push(0);
                } else {
                    samples.push([radius * Math.cos(angle) + 1.5, radius * Math.sin(angle) + 0.5]);
                    labels.push(1);
                }
            }
        }

        function generateCircles() {
            for (let i = 0; i < state.nSamples; i++) {
                const angle = 2 * Math.PI * Math.random();
                const radius = 0.1 + 0.3 * Math.random();
                
                if (i < state.nSamples / 2) {
                    samples.push([radius * Math.cos(angle) + 0.5, radius * Math.sin(angle) + 0.5]);
                    labels.push(0);
                } else {
                    samples.push([radius * Math.cos(angle) + 0.5, radius * Math.sin(angle) + 0.5]);
                    labels.push(1);
                }
            }
        }

        function generateBlobs() {
            for (let i = 0; i < state.nSamples; i++) {
                if (i < state.nSamples / 2) {
                    samples.push([0.3 + 0.2 * Math.random(), 0.3 + 0.4 * Math.random()]);
                    labels.push(0);
                } else {
                    samples.push([0.7 + 0.2 * Math.random(), 0.3 + 0.4 * Math.random()]);
                    labels.push(1);
                }
            }
        }

        function generateXOR() {
            for (let i = 0; i < state.nSamples; i++) {
                if (i < state.nSamples / 2) {
                    if (Math.random() < 0.5) {
                        samples.push([0.2 + 0.2 * Math.random(), 0.2 + 0.2 * Math.random()]);
                    } else {
                        samples.push([0.6 + 0.2 * Math.random(), 0.6 + 0.2 * Math.random()]);
                    }
                    labels.push(0);
                } else {
                    if (Math.random() < 0.5) {
                        samples.push([0.6 + 0.2 * Math.random(), 0.2 + 0.2 * Math.random()]);
                    } else {
                        samples.push([0.2 + 0.2 * Math.random(), 0.6 + 0.2 * Math.random()]);
                    }
                    labels.push(1);
                }
            }
        }

        // Decision Tree implementation
        class DecisionTree {
            constructor(maxDepth, minSamplesSplit) {
                this.maxDepth = maxDepth;
                this.minSamplesSplit = minSamplesSplit;
                this.root = null;
            }

            fit(X, y) {
                this.root = this.buildTree(X, y, 0);
            }

            buildTree(X, y, depth) {
                const nSamples = X.length;
                const nFeatures = X[0].length;
                const nClasses = new Set(y).size;

                // Stopping conditions
                if (depth >= this.maxDepth || nSamples < this.minSamplesSplit || nClasses === 1) {
                    return {
                        isLeaf: true,
                        class: this.majorityVote(y),
                        samples: nSamples
                    };
                }

                // Find best split
                let bestSplit = this.findBestSplit(X, y, nFeatures);

                // If no split improves purity
                if (bestSplit.gain <= 0) {
                    return {
                        isLeaf: true,
                        class: this.majorityVote(y),
                        samples: nSamples
                    };
                }

                // Split the data
                const leftIndices = [];
                const rightIndices = [];
                
                for (let i = 0; i < X.length; i++) {
                    if (X[i][bestSplit.feature] <= bestSplit.threshold) {
                        leftIndices.push(i);
                    } else {
                        rightIndices.push(i);
                    }
                }

                const leftX = leftIndices.map(i => X[i]);
                const leftY = leftIndices.map(i => y[i]);
                const rightX = rightIndices.map(i => X[i]);
                const rightY = rightIndices.map(i => y[i]);

                // Build subtrees
                return {
                    isLeaf: false,
                    feature: bestSplit.feature,
                    threshold: bestSplit.threshold,
                    left: this.buildTree(leftX, leftY, depth + 1),
                    right: this.buildTree(rightX, rightY, depth + 1),
                    samples: nSamples
                };
            }

            findBestSplit(X, y, nFeatures) {
                let bestSplit = { gain: -1 };
                const currentGini = this.gini(y);

                // Try random subset of features
                const featureSubset = [];
                while (featureSubset.length < Math.sqrt(nFeatures)) {
                    const f = Math.floor(Math.random() * nFeatures);
                    if (!featureSubset.includes(f)) {
                        featureSubset.push(f);
                    }
                }

                for (const feature of featureSubset) {
                    const featureValues = X.map(x => x[feature]);
                    const uniqueValues = [...new Set(featureValues)].sort((a, b) => a - b);

                    // Try thresholds at midpoints between unique values
                    for (let i = 1; i < uniqueValues.length; i++) {
                        const threshold = (uniqueValues[i - 1] + uniqueValues[i]) / 2;

                        // Split the data
                        const leftY = [];
                        const rightY = [];
                        
                        for (let j = 0; j < X.length; j++) {
                            if (X[j][feature] <= threshold) {
                                leftY.push(y[j]);
                            } else {
                                rightY.push(y[j]);
                            }
                        }

                        // Calculate information gain
                        const n = y.length;
                        const giniLeft = this.gini(leftY);
                        const giniRight = this.gini(rightY);
                        const gain = currentGini - 
                                    (leftY.length / n) * giniLeft - 
                                    (rightY.length / n) * giniRight;

                        if (gain > bestSplit.gain) {
                            bestSplit = {
                                feature,
                                threshold,
                                gain,
                                leftGini: giniLeft,
                                rightGini: giniRight
                            };
                        }
                    }
                }

                return bestSplit;
            }

            gini(y) {
                if (y.length === 0) return 0;
                
                const counts = {};
                for (const label of y) {
                    counts[label] = (counts[label] || 0) + 1;
                }
                
                let impurity = 1;
                for (const key in counts) {
                    const prob = counts[key] / y.length;
                    impurity -= prob * prob;
                }
                
                return impurity;
            }

            majorityVote(y) {
                const counts = {};
                for (const label of y) {
                    counts[label] = (counts[label] || 0) + 1;
                }
                
                let maxCount = -1;
                let majorityClass = null;
                
                for (const key in counts) {
                    if (counts[key] > maxCount) {
                        maxCount = counts[key];
                        majorityClass = parseInt(key);
                    }
                }
                
                return majorityClass;
            }

            predictSingle(x) {
                let node = this.root;
                while (!node.isLeaf) {
                    if (x[node.feature] <= node.threshold) {
                        node = node.left;
                    } else {
                        node = node.right;
                    }
                }
                return node.class;
            }

            predict(X) {
                return X.map(x => this.predictSingle(x));
            }
        }

        // Random Forest implementation
        class RandomForest {
            constructor(nTrees, maxDepth, minSamplesSplit) {
                this.nTrees = nTrees;
                this.maxDepth = maxDepth;
                this.minSamplesSplit = minSamplesSplit;
                this.trees = [];
            }

            fit(X, y) {
                this.trees = [];
                const nSamples = X.length;
                
                for (let i = 0; i < this.nTrees; i++) {
                    // Bootstrap sample
                    const indices = [];
                    for (let j = 0; j < nSamples; j++) {
                        indices.push(Math.floor(Math.random() * nSamples));
                    }
                    
                    const X_sample = indices.map(idx => X[idx]);
                    const y_sample = indices.map(idx => y[idx]);
                    
                    const tree = new DecisionTree(this.maxDepth, this.minSamplesSplit);
                    tree.fit(X_sample, y_sample);
                    this.trees.push(tree);
                }
            }

            predict(X) {
                const predictions = this.trees.map(tree => tree.predict(X));
                const finalPredictions = [];
                
                for (let i = 0; i < X.length; i++) {
                    const votes = {};
                    for (let j = 0; j < this.trees.length; j++) {
                        const vote = predictions[j][i];
                        votes[vote] = (votes[vote] || 0) + 1;
                    }
                    
                    let maxVotes = -1;
                    let predictedClass = null;
                    for (const key in votes) {
                        if (votes[key] > maxVotes) {
                            maxVotes = votes[key];
                            predictedClass = parseInt(key);
                        }
                    }
                    
                    finalPredictions.push(predictedClass);
                }
                
                return finalPredictions;
            }
        }

        // Model training
        function trainModel() {
            const rf = new RandomForest(state.nTrees, state.maxDepth, state.minSamplesSplit);
            rf.fit(samples, labels);
            trees = rf.trees;
            predictions = rf.predict(samples);
        }

        // Rendering
        function render() {
            // Clear canvases
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            treeCtx.clearRect(0, 0, treeCanvas.width, treeCanvas.height);
            
            // Draw decision boundary
            if (state.showDecisionBoundary) {
                drawDecisionBoundary();
            }
            
            // Draw samples
            if (state.showSamples) {
                drawSamples();
            }
            
            // Draw tree structure
            if (state.showTreeStructure) {
                drawTreeStructure();
            }
            
            // Update stats
            updateStats();
        }

        function drawDecisionBoundary() {
            const resolution = 20;
            const cellSize = canvas.width / resolution;
            
            // Create grid points
            const gridPoints = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < resolution; i++) {
                for (let j = 0; j < resolution; j++) {
                    const x = i / resolution;
                    const y = j / resolution;
                    gridPoints.push([x, y]);
                }
            }
            
            // Predict for grid points
            let gridPredictions;
            if (state.showAllTrees) {
                // Show ensemble prediction
                const rf = new RandomForest(state.nTrees, state.maxDepth, state.minSamplesSplit);
                rf.trees = trees;
                gridPredictions = rf.predict(gridPoints);
            } else {
                // Show single tree prediction
                gridPredictions = trees[state.currentTree].predict(gridPoints);
            }
            
            // Draw grid
            for (let i = 0; i < gridPoints.length; i++) {
                const [x, y] = gridPoints[i];
                const pred = gridPredictions[i];
                
                ctx.fillStyle = pred === 0 ? 'rgba(200, 200, 255, 0.5)' : 'rgba(255, 200, 200, 0.5)';
                ctx.fillRect(x * canvas.width, y * canvas.height, cellSize, cellSize);
            }
        }

        function drawSamples() {
            for (let i = 0; i < samples.length; i++) {
                const [x, y] = samples[i];
                const label = labels[i];
                const pred = predictions[i];
                
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(x * canvas.width, y * canvas.height, 4, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
                ctx.fillStyle = label === 0 ? 'blue' : 'red';
                ctx.fill();
                
                // Draw border if misclassified
                if (label !== pred) {
                    ctx.strokeStyle = 'black';
                    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                    ctx.stroke();
                }
            }
        }

        function drawTreeStructure() {
            const tree = trees[state.currentTree];
            const nodePositions = {};
            const levelHeights = {};
            const maxDepth = getTreeDepth(tree.root);
            
            // Calculate positions
            calculateNodePositions(tree.root, 0, 0, 1, nodePositions, levelHeights, maxDepth);
            
            // Draw connections
            drawTreeConnections(tree.root, nodePositions);
            
            // Draw nodes
            drawTreeNodes(tree.root, nodePositions);
        }

        function calculateNodePositions(node, level, position, index, nodePositions, levelHeights, maxDepth) {
            const treeWidth = treeCanvas.width;
            const treeHeight = treeCanvas.height;
            const nodeRadius = 15;
            const levelHeight = treeHeight / (maxDepth + 1);
            
            if (node.isLeaf) {
                const x = position * treeWidth;
                const y = (level + 1) * levelHeight;
                nodePositions[index] = { x, y, node };
                levelHeights[level] = (levelHeights[level] || 0) + 1;
                return { count: 1, width: 1 };
            } else {
                const left = calculateNodePositions(node.left, level + 1, position, index * 2, nodePositions, levelHeights, maxDepth);
                const right = calculateNodePositions(node.right, level + 1, position + left.width, index * 2 + 1, nodePositions, levelHeights, maxDepth);
                
                const totalWidth = left.width + right.width;
                const x = (position + totalWidth / 2) * treeWidth;
                const y = (level + 1) * levelHeight;
                
                nodePositions[index] = { x, y, node };
                levelHeights[level] = (levelHeights[level] || 0) + 1;
                
                return { count: left.count + right.count, width: totalWidth };
            }
        }

        function drawTreeConnections(node, nodePositions, parentIndex = 1) {
            if (node.isLeaf) return;
            
            const parentPos = nodePositions[parentIndex];
            const leftPos = nodePositions[parentIndex * 2];
            const rightPos = nodePositions[parentIndex * 2 + 1];
            
            // Draw lines to children
            treeCtx.beginPath();
            treeCtx.moveTo(parentPos.x, parentPos.y);
            treeCtx.lineTo(leftPos.x, leftPos.y);
            treeCtx.stroke();
            
            treeCtx.beginPath();
            treeCtx.moveTo(parentPos.x, parentPos.y);
            treeCtx.lineTo(rightPos.x, rightPos.y);
            treeCtx.stroke();
            
            // Recurse
            drawTreeConnections(node.left, nodePositions, parentIndex * 2);
            drawTreeConnections(node.right, nodePositions, parentIndex * 2 + 1);
        }

        function drawTreeNodes(node, nodePositions, parentIndex = 1) {
            const pos = nodePositions[parentIndex];
            
            // Draw node
            treeCtx.beginPath();
            treeCtx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, 15, 0, 2 * Math.PI);
            treeCtx.fillStyle = 'white';
            treeCtx.fill();
            treeCtx.stroke();
            
            // Draw node info
            treeCtx.fillStyle = 'black';
            treeCtx.font = '10px Arial';
            treeCtx.textAlign = 'center';
            treeCtx.textBaseline = 'middle';
            
            if (node.isLeaf) {
                treeCtx.fillText(node.class, pos.x, pos.y);
            } else {
                treeCtx.fillText(`X${node.feature} ≤ ${node.threshold.toFixed(2)}`, pos.x, pos.y);
            }
            
            // Recurse
            if (!node.isLeaf) {
                drawTreeNodes(node.left, nodePositions, parentIndex * 2);
                drawTreeNodes(node.right, nodePositions, parentIndex * 2 + 1);
            }
        }

        function getTreeDepth(node) {
            if (node.isLeaf) return 0;
            return 1 + Math.max(getTreeDepth(node.left), getTreeDepth(node.right));
        }

        function updateStats() {
            // Calculate accuracy
            let correct = 0;
            for (let i = 0; i < labels.length; i++) {
                if (labels[i] === predictions[i]) {
                    correct++;
                }
            }
            const accuracy = (correct / labels.length * 100).toFixed(1);
            
            document.getElementById('accuracy').textContent = accuracy;
            document.getElementById('nSamplesValue').textContent = state.nSamples;
            document.getElementById('nTreesValue').textContent = state.nTrees;
            document.getElementById('maxDepthValue').textContent = state.maxDepth;
            document.getElementById('minSamplesSplitValue').textContent = state.minSamplesSplit;
            document.getElementById('noiseLevelValue').textContent = state.noiseLevel.toFixed(2);
            document.getElementById('currentTreeValue').textContent = state.currentTree + 1;
        }

        // Event handlers
        function updateNTrees(e) {
            state.nTrees = parseInt(e.target.value);
            document.getElementById('nTreesValue').textContent = state.nTrees;
            retrainModel();
        }

        function updateMaxDepth(e) {
            state.maxDepth = parseInt(e.target.value);
            document.getElementById('maxDepthValue').textContent = state.maxDepth;
            retrainModel();
        }

        function updateMinSamplesSplit(e) {
            state.minSamplesSplit = parseInt(e.target.value);
            document.getElementById('minSamplesSplitValue').textContent = state.minSamplesSplit;
            retrainModel();
        }

        function updateNSamples(e) {
            state.nSamples = parseInt(e.target.value);
            document.getElementById('nSamplesValue').textContent = state.nSamples;
            regenerateData();
        }

        function updateNoiseLevel(e) {
            state.noiseLevel = parseFloat(e.target.value);
            document.getElementById('noiseLevelValue').textContent = state.noiseLevel.toFixed(2);
            regenerateData();
        }

        function updateDatasetType(e) {
            state.datasetType = e.target.value;
            regenerateData();
        }

        function updateCurrentTree(e) {
            state.currentTree = parseInt(e.target.value);
            document.getElementById('currentTreeValue').textContent = state.currentTree + 1;
            render();
        }

        function toggleShowAllTrees(e) {
            state.showAllTrees = e.target.checked;
            render();
        }

        function toggleShowDecisionBoundary(e) {
            state.showDecisionBoundary = e.target.checked;
            render();
        }

        function toggleShowSamples(e) {
            state.showSamples = e.target.checked;
            render();
        }

        function toggleShowTreeStructure(e) {
            state.showTreeStructure = e.target.checked;
            render();
        }

        function retrainModel() {
            trainModel();
            render();
        }

        function regenerateData() {
            generateData();
            trainModel();
            render();
        }
    </script>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Random Forest Interactive Demo</h1>
    
    <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <!-- Main visualization -->
        <div style="margin: 10px;">
            <canvas id="mainCanvas" width="400" height="400" style="border: 1px solid black;"></canvas>
            <div>
                <p>Accuracy: <span id="accuracy">0</span>%</p>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Tree visualization -->
        <div style="margin: 10px;">
            <canvas id="treeCanvas" width="400" height="400" style="border: 1px solid black;"></canvas>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Controls -->
        <div style="margin: 10px; width: 300px;">
            <h3>Dataset Controls</h3>
            <div>
                <label>Dataset type:
                    <select id="datasetType">
                        <option value="moons">Moons</option>
                        <option value="circles">Circles</option>
                        <option value="blobs">Blobs</option>
                        <option value="xor">XOR</option>
                    </select>
                </label>
            </div>
            <div>
                <label>Number of samples: <span id="nSamplesValue">100</span>
                    <input type="range" id="nSamples" min="10" max="500" value="100">
                </label>
            </div>
            <div>
                <label>Noise level: <span id="noiseLevelValue">0.10</span>
                    <input type="range" id="noiseLevel" min="0" max="0.5" step="0.01" value="0.1">
                </label>
            </div>
            <button id="generateDataBtn">Generate New Data</button>
            
            <h3>Model Controls</h3>
            <div>
                <label>Number of trees: <span id="nTreesValue">10</span>
                    <input type="range" id="nTrees" min="1" max="50" value="10">
                </label>
            </div>
            <div>
                <label>Max depth: <span id="maxDepthValue">5</span>
                    <input type="range" id="maxDepth" min="1" max="10" value="5">
                </label>
            </div>
            <div>
                <label>Min samples to split: <span id="minSamplesSplitValue">2</span>
                    <input type="range" id="minSamplesSplit" min="2" max="20" value="2">
                </label>
            </div>
            <button id="trainBtn">Retrain Model</button>
            
            <h3>Visualization Controls</h3>
            <div>
                <label>Show all trees (ensemble):
                    <input type="checkbox" id="showAllTrees">
                </label>
            </div>
            <div>
                <label>Current tree: <span id="currentTreeValue">1</span>
                    <input type="range" id="currentTree" min="0" max="9" value="0">
                </label>
            </div>
            <div>
                <label>Show decision boundary:
                    <input type="checkbox" id="showDecisionBoundary" checked>
                </label>
            </div>
            <div>
                <label>Show samples:
                    <input type="checkbox" id="showSamples" checked>
                </label>
            </div>
            <div>
                <label>Show tree structure:
                    <input type="checkbox" id="showTreeStructure">
                </label>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="margin: 20px;">
        <h3>How to Use This Demo</h3>
        <ul>
            <li>Adjust dataset parameters to change the training data distribution</li>
            <li>Modify model hyperparameters to see their effect on the decision boundary</li>
            <li>Toggle between viewing individual trees and the full ensemble</li>
            <li>Explore the structure of individual decision trees</li>
            <li>Red points are class 1, blue points are class 0</li>
            <li>Black borders indicate misclassified points</li>
        </ul>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

messages.content:
Generate a single, self-contained HTML file with embedded CSS and JavaScript that demonstrates the concept Random Forest with MAXIMUM interactivity and rich user control. Focus on:

- Multiple interactive controls (buttons, sliders, input fields)
- Complex state transitions and user-driven workflows
- Deep exploration capabilities with many possible interaction paths
- Rich functionality as the PRIMARY goal

IMPORTANT: Keep visual design EXTREMELY MINIMAL and BASIC - use simple black text on white background, basic HTML elements with no styling, no colors, no animations. The interface should be functional but visually plain and unpolished. Prioritize interactive richness over visual appeal.

Only respond with the complete HTML file.
